html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Year of the Catcoon

Ticoons can be summoned from an active Catcoon Shrine for 1 Lucky Gold Nugget and can be used to help find Kitcoons. Only one Ticoon can be summoned at a time. After a Ticoon is summoned, it will start walking towards the nearest undiscovered Kitcoon and periodically stop and wait for the player to follow before continuing on. If the player goes in another direction the Ticoon will follow, but when the player stops moving it will hiss and turn back towards the direction of the Kitcoon, waiting for the player to follow.

Once the Ticoon is close to the hidden Kitcoon it will stop. An "Investigate" option will appear when hovering over the object the Kitcoon is hidden behind. Once investigated, the Kitcoon will come out and drop a Large Red Pouch. The Ticoon will then disappear and another Ticoon can be summoned to find another Kitcoon.

To dismiss a Ticoon, the player can kill the Ticoon or right click the Ticoon to abandon it.

Fighting Strategy

Below is the number of hits it takes with each weapon to kill a Ticoon when playing with characters with a default damage modifier. The Weather Pain, Brightshade Staff, and Bee Mine are not included due to their random natures. This table does not take into account the damage bonus gained from characters with a lunar or shadow affinity. It also does not take into account the 40% damage bonus Wendy gets from attacking the same mob as Abigail, Wanda's damage bonus with Shadow weapons (except for the Alarming Clock, which does accurately reflect that bonus), or Wolfgang's damage multiplier when he isn't mighty.

It takes 1 blast with an Ice Staff to freeze Ticoon, and 5 Sleep Darts to put it to sleep.

Tips

  • Since Ticoons are easy to spawn and can drop one Meat, repeatedly killing them is an easy food source.

Gallery

  • Ticoon dances when Kitcoon is found.

"ticoon"
“He looks like he knows what he's doing!”
–Wilson
“What a fancy, tired looking catcoon. Maybe he's a businessman.”
–Willow
“Is Wolfgang's furry friend.”
–Wolfgang
“He is the light I must follow.”
–Wendy
“YOU WILL DISCLOSE THE LOCATION OF YOUR PEERS IMMEDIATELY”
–WX-78
“Quite a wise feline.”
–Wickerbottom
“Must be one of them forest tigers.”
–Woodie
“This high status catcoon has a talent for finding the kits. I respect him only marginally more.”
–Maxwell
“A mighty beast wörthy öf his cröwn. He will lead us tö victöry!”
–Wigfrid
“Your majesty!”
–Webber
“He looks very well fed.”
–Warly
“Big fur friend”
–Wormwood
“Huh. Never thought I'd see the day when the fat cats work for ME.”
–Winona
“I've set my worries to the side, they'll be my guide!”
–Wortox
“It big squishy kitty! Hello!”
–Wurt
“Is that a real man-eating tiger? I thought they'd be bigger.”
–Walter
“Aha! I knew I remembered seeing orange ones!”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Ticoon có thể được triệu hồi từ Đền Catcoon đang hoạt động để lấy 1 Thỏi Vàng May Mắn và có thể dùng để giúp tìm Kitcoon. Mỗi lần chỉ có thể triệu hồi một Ticoon. Sau khi Ticoon được triệu hồi, nó sẽ bắt đầu đi về phía Kitcoon chưa được khám phá gần nhất và định kỳ dừng lại chờ người chơi đi theo trước khi tiếp tục. Nếu người chơi đi hướng khác thì Ticoon sẽ đi theo, nhưng khi người chơi ngừng di chuyển nó sẽ rít lên và quay về hướng của Kitcoon, chờ người chơi đi theo.

Hello! |walter = Is that a real man-eating tiger? I thought they'd be bigger. |wanda = Aha! I knew I remembered seeing orange ones! |choose = wigfrid}} '''Ticoons''' can be summoned from an active [[Catcoon Shrine]] for 1 [[Lucky Gold Nugget]] and can be used to help find [[Kitcoon]]s. Only one Ticoon can be summoned at a time. After a Ticoon is summoned, it will start walking towards the nearest undiscovered Kitcoon and periodically stop and wait for the player to follow before continuing on. If the player goes in another direction the Ticoon will follow, but when the player stops moving it will hiss and turn back towards the direction of the Kitcoon, waiting for the player to follow. Once the Ticoon is close to the hidden Kitcoon it will stop. An "Investigate" option will appear when hovering over the object the Kitcoon is hidden behind. Once investigated, the Kitcoon will come out and drop a Large [[Red Pouch]]. The Ticoon will then disappear and another Ticoon can be summoned to find another Kitcoon. To dismiss a Ticoon, the player can kill the Ticoon or right click the Ticoon to abandon it. == {{Pic|32|Spear}} Fighting Strategy == {{Weapon Hits DST|health=200|icestaff=1|sleepdart=5}} == {{Tips}} Tips == * Since Ticoons are easy to spawn and can drop one [[Meat/DST|Meat]], repeatedly killing them is an easy food source. == {{Pic|32|Blueprint}}Gallery == File:Ticoon Dance.gif|Ticoon dances when Kitcoon is found. {{Clear}} Mobs= {{Mobs}} |-| Craftable Items= {{Craftable Items}} [[Category:Lunar New Year]] [[Category:Offerings Filter]]
